title: Nurse Practitioner

rationales.taskAutomation: Documentation, standard order sets and routine prescription refills are automatable; independent diagnosis and treatment planning are not.
rationales.toolMaturity: Ambient documentation and decision-support tools are credible and improving quickly, similar to what's shipping for physicians.
rationales.adoption: Adoption tracks large health-system deployment of ambient scribing and decision support, now common in bigger practices.
rationales.agenticExposure: Agents can pre-draft visit notes and flag abnormal results, but diagnosis and prescribing authority remain with the NP.

tasksAtRisk: Standard lab and imaging result review
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 29-1171 (Nurse Practitioners), p25-p75 rounded
insight: Ambient scribing is cutting real documentation time for NPs the same way it is for physicians, and NPs are increasingly filling the primary-care access gap AI can't close. Scope-of-practice expansion is a bigger factor than AI displacement here.
